brand_concept.vibe: Meme coin degen culture meets Las Vegas neon glow. Feels like a midnight Solana casino run where every roll could flip the portfolio. Bold, unhinged, but still structured and trustworthy.
inspiration: Meme coin chart pumps (Pepe, BONK, WIF)
avoid: Childish cartoonish (we are NOT a casual mobile game)
Traditional Vegas kitsch (playing cards, roulette wheels are overused)

primary.name: Meme Lime
primary.role: Accent / glow / CTA — the signature neon color
primary.usage: Text highlights, icon edges, hover states

wordmark_layout.treatment: 'MEME' in pure white, 'CASINO' in Meme Lime (#C6FF3A)
wordmark_layout.effect: Slight outer glow on 'CASINO' (lime, 8px blur, 40% opacity)

primary_option.name: Neon Diamond Chip
primary_option.description: A 3D-rotated diamond (4-sided gem) rendered in Meme Lime with a glowing sparkle (✦) centered inside. Rotated 45°. Suggests both a crypto 'gem coin' (diamond hands / 💎) AND a casino chip. The sparkle centerpoint reads as both a slot machine star and a VRF randomness glyph.
elements: Outer shape: rhombus / diamond, 45° rotation, rounded 6px corners
Inner: dark negative space (#0D0E2A) with 4-pointed star (✦) in Meme Lime
Outer glow: #C6FF3A at 50% opacity, 24px blur radius
primary_option.rationale: Already used as favicon — evolves naturally into a full brand mark.

alternative_options.name: Slot Skull
alternative_options.description: Pixel-art / 8-bit skull with dollar sign eyes and three slot-machine reels (🎰) as teeth. Lime and purple accents. Heavy meme energy.

alternative_options.name: Pepe Degen Dealer
alternative_options.description: Stylized Pepe frog head wearing a green visor and holding a SOL coin, one eye half-closed like 'trust me bro'. Feels copyright-sensitive — use loose inspiration only.

alternative_options.name: Solana-Chip Fusion
alternative_options.description: Poker chip from above, but the chip surface IS a Solana ecosystem gradient (purple→teal). Center has 'MC' monogram in Meme Lime. Bevel + neon rim light.

alternative_options.name: Crashing Rocket Graph
alternative_options.description: Abstract line chart soaring up (crypto pump style) morphed into a rocket trail, with a casino chip at the origin. Captures 'crash' game + degen pump culture.

logo_variations.primary_combination: Icon (diamond chip) + wordmark horizontal — icon left, MEME CASINO to the right
logo_variations.stacked: Icon on top, MEME CASINO centered below (for square spaces)
logo_variations.icon_only: Diamond chip alone — favicon, app icon, social avatars
logo_variations.wordmark_only: MEME CASINO text — letterheads, long horizontal banners

ai_generation_prompts.midjourney_v6_primary: neon diamond-shaped casino chip logo, lime green #C6FF3A gradient fill, dark navy background #0D0E2A, 4-pointed sparkle star in center, glowing outer rim, minimalist flat vector style, crypto casino branding, high contrast, iconic simple mark, no text, centered composition, 1:1 --style raw --s 250 --v 6
ai_generation_prompts.midjourney_v6_mascot: degenerate frog mascot wearing green visor, holding neon Solana coin, lime green and purple color palette, crypto casino vibe, sticker art style, bold outlined, transparent background, 1:1 --style raw --s 500 --v 6
ai_generation_prompts.dalle3_primary: Create a minimalist casino logo: a rotated diamond-shaped gem in lime neon green (#C6FF3A) with a four-pointed sparkle star at its center. Glowing edges, flat vector illustration, dark navy background (#0D0E2A). Iconic, crypto-themed, scalable. No text. 1:1 square.
ai_generation_prompts.stable_diffusion_sdxl: casino chip logo vector, diamond shape, lime neon glow, solana purple accents, dark background, crypto branding, minimalist, clean lines, iconic emblem, 8k, symmetrical, 1:1
ai_generation_prompts.banner_social: futuristic crypto casino banner, neon lime and purple gradient, 'MEME CASINO' bold white text with lime glow on right side, abstract Solana tokens floating, dark cosmic background, cyberpunk arcade style, wide aspect ratio, high quality digital art

design_rules.minimum_size: 24px for icon, 120px wide for wordmark (any smaller loses glow detail)
design_rules.clear_space: Minimum padding around logo = 50% of icon height
do_not: Do NOT change the Meme Lime color — it is the brand
Do NOT add drop shadows in soft gray — only lime/purple glows
Do NOT stretch or skew the wordmark
Do NOT place logo on busy photographic backgrounds without a solid overlay
Do NOT combine with competing neon colors (orange, magenta)
do: Pair with dark navy (#0D0E2A) or pure black backgrounds
Keep tight letter spacing for impact

sites: luck.io — dark + lime accent (our core reference)

export_guidelines.background: Transparent for primary variants; filled for social exports
